field_description: Identifies whether a review is a registered user's experience review or a Massage Nexus editorial review. It does not describe the reviewed target.

field_option.option_description: Experience review submitted by a registered user.
Structured review produced through the approved Massage Nexus editorial workflow.

field_description: Discloses payment, advance notice, sponsorship, requested access, or other circumstances that may affect how a review experience was arranged or perceived.

field_option.option_description: The reviewer paid normally, did not announce the review, received no review-related incentive, and must still disclose any material relationship or conflict.
The target knew in advance that the experience would be reviewed.
A sponsor funded or arranged the reviewed experience.
The reviewer received a discount connected to the reviewed experience.
The reviewed service or experience was provided without charge.
Massage Nexus or a Review Author was paid to conduct the disclosed editorial review.
A product or access sample was supplied for review.
An establishment owner or manager requested the review.
A practitioner requested the review.
A product owner, seller, or distributor requested the review.
The review was commissioned for private improvement and is not intended for public publication.
The review combines more than one distinct visit or use period.
The review combines the credited work of more than one Review Author.

field_description: Identifies whether a 1-to-10 target rating contains one overall score or target-specific criterion scores.

field_option.option_description: One overall score from 1 to 10.
At least three target-specific criteria scored from 1 to 10; the event score is their arithmetic mean.

selection_rule: One value per rating criterion entry; applicable options depend on target_collection
field_description: Identifies the approved spa or therapist quality dimension represented by one criterion score. Spa and therapist criteria must not be mixed in one rating event.

field_option.option_description: Spa hygiene, linens, smell, bathroom condition, visible sanitation, and physical cleanliness.
Spa ambience, room setup, noise, temperature, relaxation, and ease of settling into the experience.
Spa room separation, discretion, draping-related environment, safety, and client protection.
Spa reception, booking, waiting, handoff, staff handling, organization, and service flow.
Whether the experience fits its price, class, promise, and user expectation.
Therapist massage skill, bodywork quality, flow, and performance of the intended service.
Therapist pressure control, adjustment, sensitivity, and response to requested intensity.
Therapist hygiene, boundaries, presentation, respect, and appropriate conduct.
Therapist listening, checking in, explaining when needed, and understanding requests.
Therapist punctuality, focus, consistency, preparedness, and reasonably attributable interruptions.

field_description: Identifies the workflow or evidence source that produced a spa, therapist, or product rating event for eligibility and weighting.

field_option.option_description: Rating linked to a Massage Nexus verified completed booking or session.
Rating submitted as part of a substantive written review.
Rating linked to a confirmed external or on-site visit.
Standalone rating submitted directly from a target profile.
Rating entered from a user's manually recorded experience history.

field_description: Records whether a target-specific criterion received a numeric score, was not observed during the experience, or did not apply to the service.

field_option.option_description: The criterion was observed and has a 1-to-10 rating_score.
The reviewer could not reasonably observe the criterion during this experience.
The criterion did not apply to this service or experience.

field_description: Controls whether a rating event is eligible for official scoring while preserving moderation, revocation, replacement, and audit state.

field_option.option_description: Not active and not eligible for official scoring.
Eligible to enter user-period selection and official scoring when all other rules pass.
Temporarily excluded while moderation or evidence is reviewed.
Withdrawn by its submitting user and excluded from scoring.
Rejected through moderation and excluded from scoring.
Replaced by another eligible event for the same experience.
Invalidated after evidence, abuse, connection, or eligibility review.
